feed.title: MSFS Blog
feed.subtitle: Development updates of Microsoft Flight Simulator.

entry.title: Creator Highlight, January 2026 – CowTown
entry.summary: We’re continuing our Creator Highlight series in 2026 and are starting the new year in style, featuring popular YouTuber CowTown! Having started content creation a decade ago, CowTown (Tim) has switched his focus to Microsoft Flight Simulator in recent years. Sitting at just shy of 50’000 subscribers, Tim’s passion for our community shines through in … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, February 2026 – FlyWithLado
entry.summary: For our February Creator Highlight, we’re focusing on popular video creator FlyWithLado! Having amassed a ginormous following of over 540,000 Instagram users and many more on different platforms, FlyWithLado is redefining content creation for social media in our community.We asked them some questions to give you all a behind the scenes look at their content:Do … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator at FSExpo 2026
entry.summary: FlightSimExpo 2026 is coming up on June 12-14 from the Saint Paul RiverCentre in St. Paul, MN, USA! For the third time, the Microsoft Flight Simulator team is thrilled to be in attendance.

entry.title: iniBuilds Creator Sale
entry.summary: Top products from iniBuilds are now 30% off!Enjoy discounted pricing during our iniBuilds Creator Sale! From now until June 25th @ 10 AM Pacific (1700 UTC), save 30% off these products for MSFS 2024 and MSFS (2020):MSFS 2024 3MI2 & 6Y3 Fox Islands 58CA Hooper Heliport A340 Airliner A350 Airliner AT98 Wolf’s Fang Runway BF-108 … Continued

entry.summary: Jump to: MSFS 2020 Releases ↓ | Marketplace Backlog ↓Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 New PlayStation 5 Products First Party PC & Xbox Releases New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New PC & Xbox Products New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and … Continued

entry.title: June 18th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe MSFS team is back after spending a fantastic weekend at FSExpo 2026! It’s always a huge pleasure for the team to meet so many passionate simmers and discuss our shared love of aviation with you!In case you missed it, Head of Microsoft Flight Simulator Jorg Neumann delivered a keynote presentation from the stage … Continued

entry.title: June 25th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe public beta test for Sim Update 5.1 remains ongoing, with 1.7.34.0 being the latest test build. We would once again like to thank everyone from the community who is participating in the beta and sharing your comments and bug reports. Your feedback is invaluable to the team as we work to bring SU5.1 … Continued

entry.title: Marketplace Update Week of June 22, 2026
entry.summary: Jump to: MSFS 2020 Releases ↓ | Marketplace Backlog ↓Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 Updated PlayStation 5 Products New PC & Xbox Products New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox … Continued

entry.title: Release Notes – Sim Update 5.1 [1.7.35.0] Now Available
entry.summary: microsoft flight simulator 2024 | Sim Update 5.1 – release notes – 1.7.35.0If you are playing on PC, outdated packages in your community folder may have an unexpected impact on the title’s performance and behavior.If you suffer from stability issues or long loading times, move your community package(s) to another folder before relaunching the title.Stability … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases City Update 15: Illinois, Minnesota and Wisconsin Today
entry.summary: Take in the beauty of the lakes, rivers and rolling hills in this expansive update.Microsoft Flight Simulator City Update 15 highlights key metropolitan regions of the American states of Illinois, Minnesota, and Wisconsin. The release includes coverage of Chicago, Illinois, the Minneapolis–St. Paul metropolitan area of Minnesota, and Milwaukee, Wisconsin, among others. The update coincides … Continued
